# value(forProperty:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the group’s value for a given property.

## Declaration

```swift
func value(forProperty property: String!) -> Any!
```

## Parameters

- **property**: The name of a group property. For valid values, see [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/group-property-names].

## Return Value

The group’s value for `property`.

## Discussion

## Accessing Properties

- **posterImage()**: Returns the group’s poster image
